commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=56362f885defcbcc92815db8a5e68da10c1a8192)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Control UI Agent Files word-wrap state plumbing, a Wrap button, and stretched file-content styling.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blocker: source inspection of the PR head shows the false state renders no nowrap class and the CSS defines only a wrap class. This is not a current-main bug reproduction because current main does not have the requested toggle feature.
commands.review_followup: Human-gated because this external PR needs a branch refresh, code fixes, and contributor-supplied real UI proof before merge automation would be useful.
